title: All India Bar Exam AIBE 21th XXI Admit Card 2026
short_info: All India Bar Examination AIBE AIBE XXI has released the online application for AIBE XXI 2026 will start from 11 February 2026 and the last date to apply will be 30 April 2026.candidates should read the AIBE XXI 2026 information brochure for all the information related to the AIBE exam like syllabus, eligibility, age limit, fees, information and other types of information and then apply. WhatsApp Join Now Telegram Join Now Bar Council of India (BCI) All India Bar Examination AIBE AIBE XXI Examination 2026 AIBE 21th Exam 2026 : Short Details of Notification
application_fee: General (UR) / OBC : 3500 /- SC / ST : 2500/- Pay the Examination Fee Through E Challan Offline Mode or Pay the Exam Fee Through Online Debit Card, Credit Card or Net Banking Fee Mode All India Bar Exam AIBE XXI

rows: All India Bar Examination AIBE 21th Admit Card

All India Bar Examination AIBE AIBE XXI has released the online application for AIBE XXI 2026 will start from 11 February 2026 and the last date to apply will be 30 April 2026.candidates should read the AIBE XXI 2026 information brochure for all the information related to the AIBE exam like syllabus, eligibility, age limit, fees, information and other types of information and then apply.

text_sections.section: AIBE AIBE XXI Exam 2026: Document Required List
text_sections.content: Class 10th Matriculation Certificate | 10+2 Intermediate/Diploma Certificate | Law Degree LLB 3 Years/LLB 5 Years Certificate | Passport Size Photograph | Signature photograph | Enrollment Certificate | Category Certificate | Disability Certificate | All documents have to be uploaded in PDF format whose size should be less than 1 MB.
